notableEvents.label: Stolen base
notableEvents.detail: Dylan Crews steals (3) 2nd base. Dylan Crews to 3rd. Dylan Crews advances to 3rd, on a throwing error by catcher J.T. Realmuto.

notableEvents.label: Jorbit Vivas reached on error
notableEvents.detail: Jorbit Vivas reaches on a fielding error by third baseman Alec Bohm. Jacob Young to 3rd. Nasim Nuñez to 2nd.

notableEvents.label: Fielding error
notableEvents.detail: Jorbit Vivas reaches on a fielding error by third baseman Alec Bohm. Jacob Young to 3rd. Nasim Nuñez to 2nd.

notableEvents.label: Derek Hill pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Derek Hill singles on a ground ball to center fielder Jacob Young.

notableEvents.label: Derek Hill pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Derek Hill homers (6) on a fly ball to left center field. J.T. Realmuto scores.
